---
name: Research Spike
about: Time-boxed exploration, PoC, or feasibility study
title: "[Spike] "
labels: ["spike", "status:triage"]
---

## Question / Hypothesis

What are we trying to learn?

> e.g., Can we reduce model latency by 30% using speculative decoding with draft model?

## Scope & Time Box

What is in scope and how long?

> e.g., 1 week. Scope: Prototype speculative decoding with neosmith.intelligent-lite as draft. Not in scope: production rollout, multi-model orchestration.

## Deliverables

What does success look like?

> e.g., PoC branch with benchmark results, go/no-go recommendation doc

## Priority

- [ ] p0-critical
- [ ] p1-high
- [ ] p2-medium
- [ ] p3-low

## Domain

- [ ] domain:router
- [ ] domain:models
- [ ] domain:cli
- [ ] domain:docs
- [ ] domain:infra
